templates.name: Custom Script
templates.description: Free-form PowerShell block. Takes pipeline input via $input and emits whatever the script outputs.

templates.name: Variable Source
templates.description: Standalone producer — emit a variable or literal data source. No execution predecessor needed.

templates.name: Enumerate
templates.description: Expand a hashtable, dictionary, or enumerable into its rows so Where-Object / Select-Object / Sort-Object can filter them individually. PowerShell pipes a hashtable as one object by default; this node calls .GetEnumerator() on each piped item to unroll it. Emits `ForEach-Object { $_.GetEnumerator() }` — override the Process scriptblock if you want a different per-item transform.

parameters.name: InputObject
parameters.description: The hashtable/dictionary/enumerable to expand. Wired from upstream via the pipe.

parameters.name: Process
parameters.description: Per-item scriptblock. Default unrolls hashtables into DictionaryEntry rows (Name / Value). Replace if you need a different transform.
